description_long: This doll features a mechanical, skeletal structure with exposed joints, wires, and gears, giving it a robotic and industrial appearance. Its head is large and round with prominent, circular eyes and a wide, toothy mouth, evoking a slightly unsettling, animatronic look. The torso is composed of layered, rib-like segments, and the arms and legs are constructed from articulated rods and rings, ending in oversized, blocky feet. The entire figure is monochromatic, with a metallic, matte finish that emphasizes its machine-like qualities. There are no visible clothing items or soft materials, and the design is highly detailed, with numerous mechanical components visible from all angles. The overall form is humanoid, but the exaggerated proportions and exposed mechanisms set it apart from traditional dolls.
description: A humanoid, mechanical doll with exposed joints, wires, and gears, featuring a large head with round eyes and a wide mouth. The figure is metallic, highly detailed, and has oversized feet and articulated limbs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large, round eyes, wide mouth, and detailed mechanical torso and limbs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the head, the layered torso, and the articulated arm structure.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, spine-like torso, and the mechanical complexity of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the profile of the head, arm, and the intricate connections of the limbs.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll is entirely mechanical with exposed metal and plastic components, resembling an animatronic or robot.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms bent at the elbows and slightly raised, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide, open mouth and large, round eyes; no eyebrows or movable facial features.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is fully mechanical and smooth.
